title: Animal Perler Bead Patterns
description: A curated collection of animal-themed perler bead patterns, from cute pandas to safari lions. Perfect for wildlife lovers and beginner crafters.

title: Easy Perler Bead Patterns
description: Beginner-friendly perler bead patterns with small grids and simple color palettes. Great for kids and first-time beaders.

description: Adorable kawaii-style bead patterns perfect for cute crafts, accessories, and gifts.

title: Cat Perler Bead Patterns
description: Cute, sleepy, and playful cat perler bead patterns for feline fans of all skill levels.

title: Panda Perler Bead Patterns
description: Adorable panda bead patterns in kawaii and realistic styles. Easy and fun to make.

title: Christmas Perler Bead Patterns
description: Festive perler bead patterns for Christmas ornaments, gifts, and holiday decorations.

title: Halloween Perler Bead Patterns
description: Spooky and fun Halloween perler bead patterns featuring ghosts, pumpkins, and more.

title: Pixel Art Perler Bead Patterns
description: Retro pixel art style perler bead patterns for gamers and 8-bit art lovers.

title: Flower Perler Bead Patterns
description: Beautiful flower and floral perler bead patterns for spring crafts and decorations.

description: Gaming-inspired perler bead patterns featuring characters, icons, and sprites from classic and modern games.

description: Delicious food and drink themed perler bead patterns, from sweet treats to savory snacks.
